title: [circt-verilog] CommandLine Error: Option 'W' registered more than once!
body:
When I run circt-verilog I get the following output:

```
neilt@XCB-NEILT-L2:circt$ ./build/bin/circt-verilog
: CommandLine Error: Option 'W' registered more than once!
LLVM ERROR: inconsistency in registered CommandLine options
Aborted (core dumped)
neilt@XCB-NEILT-L2:circt$
```

I expect circt-verilog to start without producing an error.

This seems to be a conflict between llvm-project/llvm/lib/MC/MCTargetOptionsCommandFlags.cpp
```
  static cl::alias NoWarnW("W", cl::desc("Alias for --no-warn"),
                           cl::aliasopt(NoWarn));
```

and tools/circt-verilog/circt-verilog.cpp.
```
  cl::list<std::string> warningOptions{
      "W", cl::desc("Control the specified warning"), cl::value_desc("warning"),
      cl::Prefix, cl::cat(cat)};
```

I built LLVM from this commit.
```
commit cff2fdcbc3a53bc3278b459dba3f548fc44b3e98
Author: Lang Hames <lhames@gmail.com>
Date:   Sat Sep 6 18:08:35 2025 +1000

    [orc-rt] Add SPS serialization for ExecutorAddr. (#157242)
```

My LLVM config command is:
```
cd build
cmake ../llvm \
  -G Ninja \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug \
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="${TOP}"/install \
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ \
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang \
  -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="$HOME/usr" \
  -DLLVM_BUILD_EXAMPLES=False \
  -DLLVM_TARGETS_TO_BUILD="Native" \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_ASSERTIONS=false \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_LLD=On \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_PROJECTS="mlir" \
  -DLLVM_USE_SPLIT_DWARF=On \
  -DMLIR_ENABLE_BINDINGS_PYTHON=Off \
  -DLLVM_BUILD_LLVM_DYLIB=ON \
  -DLLVM_LINK_LLVM_DYLIB=ON \
  -DMLIR_LINK_MLIR_DYLIB=ON \
  -DMLIR_BUILD_MLIR_C_DYLIB=ON \
  -DLLVM_INSTALL_UTILS=ON \
  -DMLIR_INCLUDE_INTEGRATION_TESTS=False
```

I built circt from this commit:
```
commit 42e53322a8b71155252d62a5f687f1d287924d66
Author: Jacques Pienaar <jacques+gh@japienaar.info>
Date:   Tue Sep 9 10:46:16 2025 +0200

    Use properlyDominates in AffineToLoopSchedule (#8904)

    dominates does not satisfy strict weak ordering property.

    Fixes #8897
```

My circt config commit is:
```
cd build
cmake -G Ninja .. \
    -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo \
    -DCIRCT_SLANG_FRONTEND_ENABLED=1 \
    -DCIRCT_SLANG_BUILD_FROM_SOURCE=1 \
    -DLLVM_BUILD_LLVM_DYLIB=ON \
    -DLLVM_LINK_LLVM_DYLIB=ON \
    -DMLIR_DIR="${LLVM_TOP}"/build/lib/cmake/mlir \
    -DLLVM_DIR="${LLVM_TOP}"/build/lib/cmake/llvm
```

The following patch makes the problem go away, but clearly isn't the correct fix.
```
diff --git a/llvm/lib/MC/MCTargetOptionsCommandFlags.cpp b/llvm/lib/MC/MCTargetOptionsCommandFlags.cpp
index ff95ff78fd53..0aab544cd4fe 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/MC/MCTargetOptionsCommandFlags.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/MC/MCTargetOptionsCommandFlags.cpp
@@ -121,8 +121,10 @@ llvm::mc::RegisterMCTargetOptionsFlags::RegisterMCTargetOptionsFlags() {
   MCBINDOPT(FatalWarnings);

   static cl::opt<bool> NoWarn("no-warn", cl::desc("Suppress all warnings"));
+#if 0
   static cl::alias NoWarnW("W", cl::desc("Alias for --no-warn"),
                            cl::aliasopt(NoWarn));
+#endif
   MCBINDOPT(NoWarn);

   static cl::opt<bool> NoDeprecatedWarn(
```
code_blocks:
neilt@XCB-NEILT-L2:circt$ ./build/bin/circt-verilog
: CommandLine Error: Option 'W' registered more than once!
LLVM ERROR: inconsistency in registered CommandLine options

neilt@XCB-NEILT-L2:circt$
  static cl::alias NoWarnW("W", cl::desc("Alias for --no-warn"),
                           cl::aliasopt(NoWarn));
  cl::list<std::string> warningOptions{
      "W", cl::desc("Control the specified warning"), cl::value_desc("warning"),
      cl::Prefix, cl::cat(cat)};

Date:   Tue Sep 9 10:46:16 2025 +0200

    Use properlyDominates in AffineToLoopSchedule (#8904)

    dominates does not satisfy strict weak ordering property.

    Fixes #8897
cd build
cmake -G Ninja .. \
    -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo \
    -DCIRCT_SLANG_FRONTEND_ENABLED=1 \
    -DCIRCT_SLANG_BUILD_FROM_SOURCE=1 \
    -DLLVM_BUILD_LLVM_DYLIB=ON \
    -DLLVM_LINK_LLVM_DYLIB=ON \
    -DMLIR_DIR="${LLVM_TOP}"/build/lib/cmake/mlir \
    -DLLVM_DIR="${LLVM_TOP}"/build/lib/cmake/llvm
diff --git a/llvm/lib/MC/MCTargetOptionsCommandFlags.cpp b/llvm/lib/MC/MCTargetOptionsCommandFlags.cpp
index ff95ff78fd53..0aab544cd4fe 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/MC/MCTargetOptionsCommandFlags.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/MC/MCTargetOptionsCommandFlags.cpp
@@ -121,8 +121,10 @@ llvm::mc::RegisterMCTargetOptionsFlags::RegisterMCTargetOptionsFlags() {
   MCBINDOPT(FatalWarnings);

   static cl::opt<bool> NoWarn("no-warn", cl::desc("Suppress all warnings"));
+#if 0
   static cl::alias NoWarnW("W", cl::desc("Alias for --no-warn"),
                            cl::aliasopt(NoWarn));
+#endif
   MCBINDOPT(NoWarn);

   static cl::opt<bool> NoDeprecatedWarn(
